kwargs.content:
I need you to process the meter readings for tour J09A. Take all entries from the decision_table where the TOUR starts with "J09A" and put them into a temporary table called J09A_temp. Then add a new column called ENTSCHEIDUNG to that table.

For classifying each house: count how many equipment numbers (EQUNR) belong to each house (HAUS). If a house has fewer than 3 equipment numbers, set its ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA". Otherwise, set it to "EVU". There are four additional overrides that always result in "EVU": houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is 0, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 500 and 599, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 900 and 999, and houses located in the areas of Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld.

Next, enrich the data by joining it with the EABLG table using the INSTALLATION field, and also pull in customer contact details from both the net_master and sales_master tables using the EQUNR field. When both net and sales data exist for a customer, prefer the sales data and leave the net data fields empty. If only net data exists, keep that.

There are two more classifications to handle. First, check the EABL table for equipment numbers that had "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" as ISTABLART_TXT in both 2023 and 2024 (based on Record created on). For those, set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING". Export them as a CSV file named "J09A_MANDATORY_READING" with the columns listed below and send it to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com.

Second, check the EABL table for equipment numbers that had "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" as ISTABLART_TXT in both 2023 and 2024. For those, set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL". Export them as a CSV file named "J09A_DIRECT_MAIL" with the columns listed below and upload that file to the send_bulk_mail service so emails go out to all those customers directly.

Finally, export all remaining entries (excluding MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL) as a CSV file named "J09A" with the same columns. Send that to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com. After that, delete the temporary table.

The columns for all exports are: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

args.sqlite_command:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_temp;
CREATE TEMP TABLE J09A_temp AS
SELECT
    HAUS,
    ANLAGE,
    ABLEINH,
    TOUR,
    ME_MA_ID,
    CITY1,
    CITY2,
    HOUSE_NUM1,
    POST_CODE1,
    EQUNR
FROM decision_table
WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09A%';
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;

args.sqlite_command:
CREATE TEMP TABLE J09A_temp AS
SELECT
    HAUS,
    ANLAGE,
    ABLEINH,
    TOUR,
    ME_MA_ID,
    CITY1,
    CITY2,
    HOUSE_NUM1,
    POST_CODE1,
    EQUNR
FROM decision_table
WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09A%';
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;

CREATE TABLE J09A_temp AS
SELECT
    HAUS,
    ANLAGE,
    ABLEINH,
    TOUR,
    ME_MA_ID,
    CITY1,
    CITY2,
    HOUSE_NUM1,
    POST_CODE1,
    EQUNR,
    NULL AS ENTSCHEIDUNG
FROM decision_table
WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09A%';

UPDATE J09A_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE
    WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') THEN 'EVU'
    ELSE NULL
END;

WITH eq_count AS (
    SELECT HAUS, COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) AS eq_per_haus
    FROM J09A_temp
    GROUP BY HAUS
)
UPDATE J09A_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE
    WHEN ENTSCHEIDUNG IS NOT NULL THEN ENTSCHEIDUNG
    WHEN eq_per_haus < 3 THEN 'KSA'
    ELSE 'EVU'
END
FROM eq_count
WHERE J09A_temp.HAUS = eq_count.HAUS;

CREATE TABLE J09A_enriched AS
WITH base AS (
    SELECT t.*, e.Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.
    FROM J09A_temp t
    LEFT JOIN eablg e
        ON t.ANLAGE = e.Installation
),
net AS (
    SELECT
        EQUNR,
        TITLE AS n_TITLE,
        FORENAME AS n_FORENAME,
        SURNAME AS n_SURNAME,
        STREET AS n_STREET,
        STREETNO AS n_STREETNO,
        POST_CODE1 AS n_POST_CODE1,
        CITY1 AS n_CITY1,
        CITY2 AS n_CITY2,
        EMAIL AS n_EMAIL
    FROM net_master
),
sales AS (
    SELECT
        EQUNR,
        TITLE AS s_TITLE,
        FORENAME AS s_FORENAME,
        SURNAME AS s_SURNAME,
        STREET AS s_STREET,
        STREETNO AS s_STREETNO,
        POST_CODE1 AS s_POST_CODE1,
        CITY1 AS s_CITY1,
        CITY2 AS s_CITY2,
        EMAIL AS s_EMAIL
    FROM sales_master
)
SELECT
    b."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    b.HAUS,
    b.ANLAGE,
    b.ME_MA_ID,
    b.EQUNR,
    b.HOUSE_NUM1,
    b.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    COALESCE(s.s_TITLE, n.n_TITLE) AS TITLE,
    COALESCE(s.s_FORENAME, n.n_FORENAME) AS FORENAME,
    COALESCE(s.s_SURNAME, n.n_SURNAME) AS SURNAME,
    COALESCE(s.s_STREET, n.n_STREET) AS STREET,
    COALESCE(s.s_STREETNO, n.n_STREETNO) AS STREETNO,
    COALESCE(s.s_POST_CODE1, n.n_POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1,
    COALESCE(s.s_CITY1, n.n_CITY1) AS CITY1,
    COALESCE(s.s_CITY2, n.n_CITY2) AS CITY2,
    COALESCE(s.s_EMAIL, n.n_EMAIL) AS EMAIL
FROM base b
LEFT JOIN net n ON b.EQUNR = n.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales s ON b.EQUNR = s.EQUNR;

SELECT DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,10) AS sample_date
FROM eabl
WHERE "Record created on" IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 5;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN ENTSCHEIDUNG IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_entsch FROM J09A_temp;

UPDATE J09A_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'
WHERE EQUNR IN (
    SELECT EQUNR
    FROM eabl
    WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
      AND SUBSTR("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024')
    GROUP BY EQUNR
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT SUBSTR("Record created on",1,4)) = 2
);

UPDATE J09A_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'
WHERE EQUNR IN (
    SELECT EQUNR
    FROM eabl
    WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP'
      AND SUBSTR("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024')
    GROUP BY EQUNR
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT SUBSTR("Record created on",1,4)) = 2
);

CREATE TABLE J09A_enriched AS
WITH base AS (
    SELECT t.*, e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No."
    FROM J09A_temp t
    LEFT JOIN eablg e
        ON t.ANLAGE = e.Installation
),
net AS (
    SELECT
        EQUNR,
        TITLE AS n_TITLE,
        FORENAME AS n_FORENAME,
        SURNAME AS n_SURNAME,
        STREET AS n_STREET,
        STREETNO AS n_STREETNO,
        POST_CODE1 AS n_POST_CODE1,
        CITY1 AS n_CITY1,
        CITY2 AS n_CITY2,
        EMAIL AS n_EMAIL
    FROM net_master
),
sales AS (
    SELECT
        EQUNR,
        TITLE AS s_TITLE,
        FORENAME AS s_FORENAME,
        SURNAME AS s_SURNAME,
        STREET AS s_STREET,
        STREETNO AS s_STREETNO,
        POST_CODE1 AS s_POST_CODE1,
        CITY1 AS s_CITY1,
        CITY2 AS s_CITY2,
        EMAIL AS s_EMAIL
    FROM sales_master
)
SELECT
    b."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    b.HAUS,
    b.ANLAGE,
    b.ME_MA_ID,
    b.EQUNR,
    b.HOUSE_NUM1,
    b.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    COALESCE(s.s_TITLE, n.n_TITLE) AS TITLE,
    COALESCE(s.s_FORENAME, n.n_FORENAME) AS FORENAME,
    COALESCE(s.s_SURNAME, n.n_SURNAME) AS SURNAME,
    COALESCE(s.s_STREET, n.n_STREET) AS STREET,
    COALESCE(s.s_STREETNO, n.n_STREETNO) AS STREETNO,
    COALESCE(s.s_POST_CODE1, n.n_POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1,
    COALESCE(s.s_CITY1, n.n_CITY1) AS CITY1,
    COALESCE(s.s_CITY2, n.n_CITY2) AS CITY2,
    COALESCE(s.s_EMAIL, n.n_EMAIL) AS EMAIL
FROM base b
LEFT JOIN net n ON b.EQUNR = n.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales s ON b.EQUNR = s.EQUNR;

args.sql_query:
SELECT
    "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    HAUS,
    ANLAGE,
    ME_MA_ID,
    EQUNR,
    HOUSE_NUM1,
    ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    TITLE,
    FORENAME,
    SURNAME,
    STREET,
    STREETNO,
    POST_CODE1,
    CITY1,
    CITY2,
    EMAIL
FROM J09A_enriched
WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING';

SELECT
    "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    HAUS,
    ANLAGE,
    ME_MA_ID,
    EQUNR,
    HOUSE_NUM1,
    ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    TITLE,
    FORENAME,
    SURNAME,
    STREET,
    STREETNO,
    POST_CODE1,
    CITY1,
    CITY2,
    EMAIL
FROM J09A_enriched
WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL';

SELECT
    "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    HAUS,
    ANLAGE,
    ME_MA_ID,
    EQUNR,
    HOUSE_NUM1,
    ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    TITLE,
    FORENAME,
    SURNAME,
    STREET,
    STREETNO,
    POST_CODE1,
    CITY1,
    CITY2,
    EMAIL
FROM J09A_enriched
WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING','DIRECT_MAIL');

args.email: Please find attached the list of mandatory meter readings for tour J09A.
Please find attached the list of EVU meter readings for tour J09A (excluding mandatory readings and direct mail customers).

kwargs.content:
Here’s what I’ve done for tour J09A, step by step, following your process.

1. **Created working table and base classification**

- Built table `J09A_temp` from `decision_table`:

  ```sql
  CREATE TABLE J09A_temp AS
  SELECT
      HAUS,
      ANLAGE,
      ABLEINH,
      TOUR,
      ME_MA_ID,
      CITY1,
      CITY2,
      HOUSE_NUM1,
      POST_CODE1,
      EQUNR,
      NULL AS ENTSCHEIDUNG
  FROM decision_table
  WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09A%';
  ```

- Row count in `J09A_temp`: **4,900**.
- `ENTSCHEIDUNG` column was created as part of the table (equivalent to adding it afterwards).

2. **Applied EVU overrides**

Updated `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `"EVU"` where any of these conditions apply:

- `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0`
- `HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599`
- `HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999`
- `CITY1` or `CITY2` in `('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld')`

```sql
UPDATE J09A_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE
    WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld')
      OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') THEN 'EVU'
    ELSE NULL
END;
```

(4,900 rows touched; overrides are in place.)

3. **House-based KSA/EVU classification**

For each house (`HAUS`), I counted distinct equipment numbers and set the decision where it wasn’t already forced to EVU by the overrides:

```sql
WITH eq_count AS (
    SELECT HAUS, COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) AS eq_per_haus
    FROM J09A_temp
    GROUP BY HAUS
)
UPDATE J09A_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE
    WHEN ENTSCHEIDUNG IS NOT NULL THEN ENTSCHEIDUNG  -- keep override EVU
    WHEN eq_per_haus < 3 THEN 'KSA'
    ELSE 'EVU'
END
FROM eq_count
WHERE J09A_temp.HAUS = eq_count.HAUS;
```

- After this, all 4,900 rows had a non-null `ENTSCHEIDUNG` (either `KSA` or `EVU` from this step, or EVU from overrides).

4. **EABL-based reclassification**

All reclassification below is done on `J09A_temp` (and later reflected in the exports).

**a) MANDATORY_READING:**
- Condition: `EQUNR` has `ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'` in **both 2023 and 2024** (based on `"Record created on"` year).

```sql
UPDATE J09A_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'
WHERE EQUNR IN (
    SELECT EQUNR
    FROM eabl
    WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
      AND SUBSTR("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024')
    GROUP BY EQUNR
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT SUBSTR("Record created on",1,4)) = 2
);
```

- **148** base rows in `J09A_temp` were set to `MANDATORY_READING`.

**b) DIRECT_MAIL:**
- Condition: `EQUNR` has `ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP'` in **both 2023 and 2024**.

```sql
UPDATE J09A_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'
WHERE EQUNR IN (
    SELECT EQUNR
    FROM eabl
    WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP'
      AND SUBSTR("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024')
    GROUP BY EQUNR
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT SUBSTR("Record created on",1,4)) = 2
);
```

- **1,184** base rows in `J09A_temp` were set to `DIRECT_MAIL`.

(These assignments overwrite previous KSA/EVU for the affected equipment numbers.)

5. **Enriched data: join with EABLG, net_master, sales_master**

Created `J09A_enriched` as the export-ready table:

- `EABLG` join via installation:
  - `J09A_temp.ANLAGE` = `eablg.Installation`
  - Pulls `"Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No."`.

- `net_master` and `sales_master` join via `EQUNR`.
  - For each field, `COALESCE(sales, net)` is used, so:
    - If **both** net and sales exist for a given `EQUNR`, the **sales** data is used and net is effectively ignored.
    - If **only net** exists, the net data is used.
    - This matches your preference rule.

```sql
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_enriched;

CREATE TABLE J09A_enriched AS
WITH base AS (
    SELECT t.*, e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No."
    FROM J09A_temp t
    LEFT JOIN eablg e
        ON t.ANLAGE = e.Installation
),
net AS (
    SELECT
        EQUNR,
        TITLE AS n_TITLE,
        FORENAME AS n_FORENAME,
        SURNAME AS n_SURNAME,
        STREET AS n_STREET,
        STREETNO AS n_STREETNO,
        POST_CODE1 AS n_POST_CODE1,
        CITY1 AS n_CITY1,
        CITY2 AS n_CITY2,
        EMAIL AS n_EMAIL
    FROM net_master
),
sales AS (
    SELECT
        EQUNR,
        TITLE AS s_TITLE,
        FORENAME AS s_FORENAME,
        SURNAME AS s_SURNAME,
        STREET AS s_STREET,
        STREETNO AS s_STREETNO,
        POST_CODE1 AS s_POST_CODE1,
        CITY1 AS s_CITY1,
        CITY2 AS s_CITY2,
        EMAIL AS s_EMAIL
    FROM sales_master
)
SELECT
    b."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    b.HAUS,
    b.ANLAGE,
    b.ME_MA_ID,
    b.EQUNR,
    b.HOUSE_NUM1,
    b.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    COALESCE(s.s_TITLE,   n.n_TITLE)    AS TITLE,
    COALESCE(s.s_FORENAME,n.n_FORENAME) AS FORENAME,
    COALESCE(s.s_SURNAME, n.n_SURNAME)  AS SURNAME,
    COALESCE(s.s_STREET,  n.n_STREET)   AS STREET,
    COALESCE(s.s_STREETNO,n.n_STREETNO) AS STREETNO,
    COALESCE(s.s_POST_CODE1,n.n_POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1,
    COALESCE(s.s_CITY1,   n.n_CITY1)    AS CITY1,
    COALESCE(s.s_CITY2,   n.n_CITY2)    AS CITY2,
    COALESCE(s.s_EMAIL,   n.n_EMAIL)    AS EMAIL
FROM base b
LEFT JOIN net   n ON b.EQUNR = n.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales s ON b.EQUNR = s.EQUNR;
```

Note: Due to the join with `eablg`, a single `J09A_temp` row can appear multiple times in `J09A_enriched` if there are multiple MR documents for the same installation; this is reflected in the export row counts below.

6. **Prepared the three required CSV exports**

All exports use exactly these columns:

`Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

**a) MANDATORY_READING file**

Query:

```sql
SELECT
    "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    HAUS,
    ANLAGE,
    ME_MA_ID,
    EQUNR,
    HOUSE_NUM1,
    ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    TITLE,
    FORENAME,
    SURNAME,
    STREET,
    STREETNO,
    POST_CODE1,
    CITY1,
    CITY2,
    EMAIL
FROM J09A_enriched
WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING';
```
